      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Ka skaftas irr us teem Kal-
neem tahs Rahjas ta Webstne-
fcha/ kas Meeru daudzina/ Lab-
bunu fluddina/ Bestischanu sin-
nanu darra/ kas us Zianu sak-
ka: Taws Deews irr Kehntisch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tawn Sarqu Balss irr
klaht/ tee pazelt to Balsi/ un ga-
wile kohpa/ jo tee Azzim redsoht
nomannihſ/ * ka tas KUNGS
Zianu atkah atweddihs.
* Eebr: Wall: ir tà: Ka tas KUNGS us
Zianu atkah atgreeſifees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Darrajt weenu Trohffni/
gawilejeet kohpa juhs tukschas
Jerusalemes Weetas / jo tas
KUNGS irr fawus Laudis ee-
preezinais/ wiſſch irr Jerusale-
mi atpestijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Tas KUNGS irr fawu
fwehtu Elkou atsedsis preekſch
wiſſu Pagazru Azzim / un wiſ-
sas Semmes Galli redsehs to
Bestischanu muhsa Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Atkahpeet/ atkahpeet/ iß-
eita no turrenes ahra/ ne aiſkar-
xeet to Nefschihstu/ eita ahra no
winnas Widdus/ fchihstajtees
juhs/ kas juhs ta KUNGA Nih-
kus neﬀat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Jo juhs ne tseeſeet ar
Steigſchanu/ un ne staigafeet ar
Behgſchanu / jo tas KUNGS
res juhsu Preekſcha/ un tas I-
sraeta Deewß buhs juhsu Sa-
pulzinatajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Augi/ mans Raip
darrihs japrattigi
wiſſch taps pa-aug
stinahts/ un angſti eezelts/ u
tohti angſti turrehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Ka dauds tevis pehz i
istruhzinaifschees/ tik nejaufs b
ja wiſſch usluhkoht/ wairak n
kahds Zittajs/ un winna Gil
nis wairak ( nejaufs ) neka zi
tu Zilweka Behrnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Ta apflazzibs wiſſ-
dauds Paganus/ ir Kehntai fo
turrehs fawu Mutti prett wi-
nu. Jo kurreem no ta ne bt-
paſfluddinahts/ tee to redſehs/u
kas to ne btj dsirdeifschi/ tee to fa-
mannihs-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "1. Kas tizz muhsu Mahziba-
un kam irr ta KUNGA Elkou
parahdihts?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Jo tasusang preekſch wi-
na itt ka Sarrissch/ un ka Sa-
ne no fakaltufchas Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Winnam ne bija nekah-
Jankuns un Skaistums/ t
mehs winnu usluhkotum/ un n
kahds Krahschnums / kas mum-
buhtn patizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Wiſſch bija neewahts/ u
Lanschu atstahts/ pils Sahp
un Wahjtbu. Un wiſſch bt-
pulgohts ta/ ka to Waig-
preekſch winna paſlehpe/ un me-
winnu ne zeenijam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Teescham wiſſch nette mut-
fas Sehrqas/ un uskrabwah-
muhsas Sahpes/ bet mehs tu-
rejam winnu par weenu mohz-
ti
"
    }
